name: Song of Lamae
location: Sleepy Senche Overlook in Malabal Tor, Rkulftzel in Alik'r Desert, Tinkerer Tobin's Workshop in Eastmarch

bonuses.stat: When you take damage while you are under 30% Health, you deal 1377 Magic Damage to the attacker and heal for the damage done. This effect can occur once every 3 seconds and scales off your Max Health.
